data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of a persona attempting to override a prohibited setting. However, the evidence does not provide any details or endpoints that demonstrate the existence of such a setting or the mechanism to enforce it. The linked use case outlines various requirements, but there is no concrete evidence supporting the implementation of the scenario being tested, indicating a significant gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of functionality to override prohibited settings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the behavior of overriding prohibited settings.
